titleStmt.title: SII 41.10: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 10. (A.R. No. 10 of 1905.) Kīḻūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Vīraṭṭāṉēśvara temple.

This inscription begins with the prasasti commencing with ‘Tirumaṉṉivalara’ etc. It records the gift of a vessel (taṭṭam), weighing 29(3/4) kaḻanjñu and 4 manñjāḍi by the kuḍinaikal, by Irāman Maṟavaḍiyān alias Muḍikoṇḍasōla Milāḍuḍaiyān, for water offerings to the god Tiruvīraṭṭaṉam-uḍaiyamahādēva at Tirukkōvalūr, in Kuṟukkai-kūṟṟam, in Janaṉātha-vaḷanāḍu alais Milāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyun poṟceyap pāvaiyuñ cirttaṉic celviyun=taṉ perun=taviyarāka Iṉpuṟaneṭutiyalūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭarvaṉaveli paṭarvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷic cūḻmatiḷ koḷḷip pāk
kaiyun naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaik kaṭakkamum porukaṭal Īḻattaraiyar tamuṭiyu Āṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyun muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavar vaiytta cun=taramuṭiyun In=tiraṉāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻu
vatum meṟipaṭaik l cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyuñ caṅkatir mālaiyun caṅkatir velai tol peruṅkāvaṟ palpaḻan=tivum ceruvil ciṉavil Irupattorukāl Araicu kaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ me
poṟṟiruttaku muṭiyun payaṅkoṭupaḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭolitta caraciṅkaṉRead ‘cayaciṅka’Aḷapperum pukaḻḻoṭu piṭiyil lakkamum navaneti kulap
m vikkirama vira cakkarakoṭṭamum mutir vaṭarva maṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷar nāmaṇaik koṇaiyum veñcilai vira pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaippaḻaṉa mācuṇitecamum Ayarvilva
ṇkirtti Ayarnakaravayil can latintirarataṉai viḷaiyamark kaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palataṉattoṭu niṟaikula taṉakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭarum ceṟiviḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamun taṉmapālaṉai
vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolait taṇṭaputtiyun Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇurattākkit tikkaṇai kirtti takkaṇa toṭukaḻal caṅkoṭṭal mahipālaṉai
veñcamar vaḷākat taiñcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalar
tirttat teripuṉal kaṅkaiyun māpperun=taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecari panmarāṉa śrīirājentracoḻa teva
ṟku yāṇṭu 10 1āvatu milāṭāṉa janaṉāta vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaik kūṟṟa
ttu tirukkovalūr tiruviraṭṭaāṉamuṭaiya mātevaṟku Irāmaṉ maṟavaṭiyaṉā
ṉa muṭikoṇṭa coḻamilāṭuṭaiyāṉ can=tirātittavaṟ taṇṇiramurtu
ceytaruḷa kuṭutta taṭṭamoṉṟiṉāl
k kuṭiñaik kallālk kuṭininai cempo
ṉ Irupattoṉpatiṉ kaḻañce mukkā
le nālu mañcāṭiyum Āṟumā—.
Digital edition of SII 41.10 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
